rulings.Case Title: CHUN HON KWAN ET AL VS. WASHINGTON WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Filed By Fire Insurance Exchange
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday June 29, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANT (CONSOLIDATED CASE) FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE, AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Filed By Fire Insurance Exchange GRANTED, subject to opposition of clarification regarding possible stipulation for continuance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THEDA FUNG VS. SUSANA MANCIA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday June 29, 2018 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT SAMIR DAHER DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED in part and sustained in part Demurrer as to cause of action for constructively fraudulent transfer is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff has been previously given leave to amend this cause of action to allege facts in support of each element. No amendment has been made see SAC paragraphs 101-112 and TAC paragraphs 96-107. All other causes of action are sufficiently alleges and are not uncertain. Pages 17 and 18 of opposition are stricken. If Plaintiff (or Plaintiff's counsel, including other actions handled by counsel) in the future files oversized papers in violation of CRC the whole document will be stricken and not considered. Plaintiff to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YAMEN ELTAWIL VS. KIRANSINH THAKOR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs - Pos Attached
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday June 29, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT KIRANSINH THAKOR, BALBOA HOTEL, LLC, 112 HYDE ST LLC Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED in the amount of $3,165.33 (9.04 hours at $350/hour) for work on motions to expunge lis pendens. The determination that Defendant is entitled to fees was made on March 29, 2018 (See March 29, 2018 Order) any argument in opposition regarding Defendant's entitlement to fees is an improper motion for reconsideration. = (501/REQ)
